name: Vegetables Au Gratin
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix two or more kinds of fresh-cooked or leftover vegetables such as string beans, carrots, and turnips or cauliflower.
2. Place the vegetables in a shallow baking dish.
3. Pour over the vegetables a thin white sauce to which cheese has been added.
4. Cover with buttered bread crumbs.
5. Bake in a moderate oven until the sauce bubbles and the crumbs are brown.
